title: nephrodium recedens
intro: Nephrodium recedens, also known as the Receding Fern, is a species of fern in the family Matoniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat respiratory issues and its anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Nephrodium recedens include its use as a diuretic and to treat conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the fronds of the fern are often used to make infusions or teas, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
